name: 100Hires
description: Official MCP server for 100Hires ATS: candidates, jobs, applications, interviews, messages.
longDescription: 100Hires AI ATS MCP server with 130 tools for candidate management, job posting, application tracking, interviews, messages, and recruitment automation. Managed via natural language prompts.
author: com.100hires
examplePrompts: List all candidates in the pipeline
Create a new candidate for John Doe
Show me applications for the Senior Developer role
Advance this application to the interview stage
Schedule an interview for this candidate
